 usage: ceph [-h] [-c CEPHCONF] [-i INPUT_FILE] [-o OUTPUT_FILE]
             [--setuser USER] [--setgroup GROUP] [--id CLIENT_ID]
             [--name CLIENT_NAME] [--cluster CLUSTER]
             [--admin-daemon ADMIN_SOCKET] [-s] [-w] [--watch-debug]
             [--watch-info] [--watch-sec] [--watch-warn] [--watch-error]
             [-W NUM] [--watch-channel CHANNEL] [--version] [--verbose]
             [--concise] [-f {json,json-pretty,xml,xml-pretty,plain,yaml}]
             [--connect-timeout CLUSTER_TIMEOUT] [--block] [--period PERIOD]

Ceph administration tool

 General usage:
 ==============
ceph [-h] [-c ceph.conf] [-i input_file] [-o output_file]
     [--id ID] [--name TYPE.ID] [--cluster NAME]
     [-s] [-w] [--watch-channel {cluster|audit|cephadm|*}]

 Commands:
 =========
auth add                              add auth info for <entity>
auth caps                             update caps for <name>
auth del                              delete all caps for <name>
auth export                           write keyring for requested entity
auth get                              write keyring file with requested key
auth get-or-create                    add auth for <entity>
auth get-or-create-key                get or add auth key
auth import                           auth import
auth ls                               list authentication state
auth print-key                        display requested key
auth print_key                        display requested key
auth rm                               remove all caps for <name>
config dump                           dump all settings
config generate-minimal-conf          generate a minimal ceph.conf
config get                            get a configuration value
config help                           get config setting schema and descriptions
config log                            list recent history of config changes
config ls                             list available configuration options
config reset                          revert a configuration change
config rm                             revert a configuration change
config set                            set a configuration value
config show                           show running configuration
config show-with-defaults             show running configuration (including compiled-in defaults)
crash archive                         archive a crash report
crash archive-all                     archive all new crash reports
crash info                            show crash report
crash json_as_roman                   dump crash reports as json
crash ls                              list crash reports
crash ls-new                          list new crash reports
crash post                            post a crash report
crash prune                           remove crash reports older than <keep> days
crash rm                              remove a saved crash report
crash stat                            summarize saved crash reports
osd blocked-by                        print histogram of which OSDs are blocking their peers
osd blocklist add                     add (optionally until <expire>) to blocklist
osd blocklist clear                   clear all blocklisted clients
osd blocklist ls                      show blocklisted clients
osd blocklist rm                      remove from blocklist
osd crush add                         add or update crushmap position and weight
osd crush add-bucket                  add no-parent bucket to the CRUSH map
osd crush class create                create crush device class <name>
osd crush class ls                    list all crush device classes
osd crush class rename                rename crush device class <srcname> to <dstname>
osd crush class rm                    remove crush device class <name>
osd crush dump                        dump crush map
osd crush get-tunable                 get crush tunable <tunable>
osd crush ls                          list items beneath a node in the CRUSH tree
osd crush move                        move existing bucket within the CRUSH map
osd crush rename-bucket               rename bucket <srcname> to <dstname>
osd crush reweight                    change <name>'s weight to <weight> in crush map
osd crush reweight-all                recalculate the weights for the tree
osd crush reweight-subtree            change all leaf items beneath <name> to <weight>
osd crush rm                          remove <name> from crush map
osd crush rule create-replicated      create crush rule <name> for replicated pool
osd crush rule create-simple          create crush rule <name> to start from <root>
osd crush rule dump                   dump crush rule <name>
osd crush rule ls                     list crush rules
osd crush rule ls-by-class            list all crush rules that reference the same device class
osd crush rule rename                 rename crush rule <srcname> to <dstname>
osd crush rule rm                     remove crush rule <name>
osd crush set                         set crushmap values
osd crush set-tunable                 set crush tunable <tunable> to <value>
osd crush show-tunables               show current crush tunables
osd crush swap-bucket                 swap existing bucket contents from <source> to <dest>
osd crush tree                        dump crush buckets and items in a tree view
osd crush weight-set create           create a weight-set for a given pool
osd crush weight-set dump             dump the weight-set for the given pool
osd crush weight-set ls               list weight-sets
osd crush weight-set reweight         set weight for an item in a weight-set
osd crush weight-set rm               remove the weight-set for a given pool
osd df                                show OSD utilization
osd down                              set osd(s) <id> down
osd dump                              print summary of OSD map
osd erasure-code-profile get          get erasure code profile <name>
osd erasure-code-profile ls           list all erasure code profiles
osd erasure-code-profile rm           remove erasure code profile <name>
osd erasure-code-profile set          create erasure code profile <name>
osd find                              find osd <id> in the CRUSH map
osd getcrushmap                       get CRUSH map
osd getmap                            get OSD map
osd in                                set osd(s) <id> in
osd info                              print osd's {id} metadata
osd last-stat-seq                     get the last pg stats sequence number reported
osd ls                                show all OSD ids
osd lspools                           list pools
osd map                               find pg for <object> in <pool>
osd metadata                          fetch metadata for osd {id}
osd ok-to-stop                        check whether osd(s) can be safely stopped
osd out                               set osd(s) <id> out
osd pause                             pause osd
osd perf                              print dump of OSD perf summary stats
osd pg-temp                           set pg_temp mapping pgid:[<id> [<id>...]]
osd pool application disable          disables use of an application <app> on pool <poolname>
osd pool application enable           enable use of an application <app> on pool <poolname>
osd pool application get              get value of key <key> of application <app> on pool <poolname>
osd pool application rm               removes application <app> key <key> on pool <poolname>
osd pool application set              sets application <app> key <key> to <value> on pool <poolname>
osd pool autoscale-status             report on pool pg_num sizing recommendation
osd pool cancel-force-backfill        restore normal recovery priority of specified pool <who>
osd pool cancel-force-recovery        restore normal recovery priority of specified pool <who>
osd pool create                       create pool
osd pool deep-scrub                   initiate deep-scrub on pool <who>
osd pool delete                       delete pool
osd pool force-backfill               force backfill of specified pool <who> first
osd pool force-recovery               force recovery of specified pool <who> first
osd pool get                          get pool parameter <var>
osd pool get-quota                    obtain object or byte limits for pool
osd pool ls                           list pools
osd pool mksnap                       make snapshot <snap> in <pool>
osd pool rename                       rename <srcpool> to <destpool>
osd pool repair                       initiate repair on pool <who>
osd pool rm                           remove pool
osd pool rmsnap                       remove snapshot <snap> from <pool>
osd pool scrub                        initiate scrub on pool <who>
osd pool set                          set pool parameter <var> to <val>
osd pool set-quota                    set object or byte limit on pool
osd pool stats                        obtain stats from all pools or from specified pool
osd primary-affinity                  adjust osd primary-affinity from 0.0 <= <weight> <= 1.0
osd primary-temp                      set primary_temp mapping pgid:<id>|-1
osd purge                             purge all osd data from the monitors
osd repair                            initiate repair on osd
osd reweight                          reweight osd to 0.0 < <weight> < 1.0
osd reweight-by-pg                    reweight OSDs by PG distribution
osd reweight-by-utilization           reweight OSDs by utilization
osd rm                                remove osd(s) <id>
osd safe-to-destroy                   check whether osd(s) can be safely destroyed
osd set                               set <key>
osd stat                              print summary of OSD map
osd status                            print OSD status
osd tree                              print OSD tree
osd tree-from                         print OSD tree from a specific bucket
osd unpause                           unpause osd
osd unset                             unset <key>
osd utilization                       get basic pg distribution stats
pg debug                              show debug info about pgs
pg deep-scrub                         start deep-scrub on <pgid>
pg dump                               show human-readable versions of pg map
pg dump_json                          show human-readable version of pg map in json only
pg dump_pools_json                    show pg pools info in json only
pg dump_stuck                         show information about stuck pgs
pg getmap                             get binary pg map to -o/stdout
pg ls                                 list pg with specific pool, osd, state
pg ls-by-osd                          list pg on osd [osd]
pg ls-by-pool                         list pg with pool = [poolname]
pg ls-by-primary                      list pg with primary = [osd]
pg map                                show mapping of pg to osds
pg repair                             start repair on <pgid>
pg repeer                             force a PG to repeer
pg scrub                              start scrub on <pgid>
pg stat                               show placement group status
